name: Grilled Pizza Sandwiches (Sandwich Machine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread pizza sauce on one side of each bread slice.
2. Top one slice with a layer of salami, then a layer of cheese.
3. Sprinkle with garlic powder.
4. Place another slice of bread on top, sauce side down.
5. Butter both sides of the assembled sandwich.
6. Grill until the bread is golden brown and toasted. Turn off heat when finished.
